'''Sea eels''' were long, slimy, fish-like creatures that were native to [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]. They had narrow eyes and huge mouths. Household sea eels were often fed [[Sea-mouse|sea-mice]]. They were one of several [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Eel/Legends|eel]] in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

==History==
[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] kept [[Eel (pet)|one]] as a pet. When he and his father [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango]] left Kamino in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]] for the final time, Boba released his sea eel, but it was immediately devoured by a marine predator.

==Appearances==
*''[[Boba Fett: The Fight to Survive]]''
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Revelation]]'' {{Mo}}
